data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Story DD Coverage
This task satisfies: DD1 (running update-artifacts.sh triggers migration on tracker with file impact patterns)

## TDD Requirement
No new RED test task required — this is a structural wiring change following the established pattern for Phase 5 (brainstorm tag migration). The migration script test (task 361a-6c26) covers the behavioral contract. update-artifacts.sh tests (test-update-artifacts.sh) do not test migration behavior.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/scripts/update-artifacts.sh (add Phase 6 block)

## Implementation
After the Phase 5 brainstorm migration block (around line 435), add Phase 6:

  -- 6. File impact migration (file-impact-v1) --
  if [[ -z "$_DRYRUN" ]]; then
      bash "$_SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh" --target "$_TARGET" &>/dev/stderr || {
          echo '[update-artifacts] Migration warning: file-impact-v1 migration exited non-zero -- see stderr for details' >&2
      }
  fi

Best-effort: failure of migration never fails artifact update (same as Phase 5 brainstorm migration).
Only runs when --dryrun is NOT set (same as Phase 5).

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus
On 3 consecutive opus failures: escalate to user

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] update-artifacts.sh contains a Phase 6 call to ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh
  Verify: grep "ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/update-artifacts.sh | grep -q .
- [ ] Phase 6 call is gated on -z _DRYRUN (best-effort, not run in dryrun mode)
  Verify: grep -A3 "file-impact-v1" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/update-artifacts.sh | grep -q "DRYRUN"
- [ ] Existing update-artifacts.sh tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-update-artifacts.sh 2>&1 | grep "^PASSED:" | grep -q .
data.title: Register file-impact-v1 migration in update-artifacts.sh Phase 6
